things.name: National Museum of Tajikistan
things.description: Tajikistan's largest museum with the world's largest reclining Buddha statue (13m)

things.name: Rudaki Avenue
things.description: Dushanbe's grand tree-lined main avenue with fountains, palaces and the world's tallest flagpole

things.name: World's Tallest Flagpole
things.description: 165m flagpole flying the Tajik flag - held the record as world's tallest flagpole

things.name: Hisor Fortress
things.description: Ancient fortress 25km from Dushanbe with 3,000 years of history on the Silk Road

things.name: Ismoil Somoni Park
things.description: Central park with the Rudaki Monument, fountains and Tajik cultural performances

things.name: Green Bazaar (Bozori Sabza)
things.description: Traditional market with Tajik spices, dried fruits, suzani embroidery and handicrafts

things.name: Dushanbe Opera and Ballet Theatre
things.description: Soviet-era cultural landmark with performances of classical music and Tajik folklore

things.name: Fann Mountains Trekking
things.description: World-class alpine hiking 200km from Dushanbe with the turquoise Iskanderkul lake

things.name: Gurminj Museum of Musical Instruments
things.description: Personal collection of traditional Tajik and Central Asian musical instruments

things.name: Varzob Gorge Day Trip
things.description: Scenic river gorge 30km north of Dushanbe with sanatoriums and hiking trails
